_comment: animayte — DEV settings for working INSIDE this repo. The statusline forwards this folder's session JSON to the local pet daemon (animayte.mjs on :4321). Hooks are intentionally NOT duplicated here: the animayte plugin (.claude-plugin → hooks/hooks.json) is the SINGLE source of the forwarding hooks, so events are never delivered twice. To get the hooks while developing, enable the animayte plugin or run `bin/animayte install`. Restart Claude Code in this folder for changes to (re)load.
